ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, We sent the Qur'an down during the Night of Decree.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, ˹It is˺ We ˹Who˺ sent this ˹Quran˺ down on the Night of Glory.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And what can make you know what is the Night of Decree?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And what will make you realize what the Night of Glory is?

ayahs.textArabic: لَيۡلَةُ ٱلۡقَدۡرِ خَيۡرٞ مِّنۡ أَلۡفِ شَهۡرٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Laylatu alqadri khayrun min alfi shahrin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: The Night of Glory is better than a thousand months.

ayahs.textArabic: تَنَزَّلُ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ فِيهَا بِإِذۡنِ رَبِّهِم مِّن كُلِّ أَمۡرٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Tanazzalu almalaikatu waalrroohu feeha biithni rabbihim min kulli amrin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: The angels and the Spirit descend therein by permission of their Lord for every matter.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: That night the angels and the ˹holy˺ spirit descend, by the permission of their Lord, for every ˹decreed˺ matter.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Peace it is until the emergence of dawn.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: It is all peace until the break of dawn.
